v1.1.0_changes: B1: Quality Baseline Generation + Cross-Round Trend Analysis — FinalReport step1_5 (MF17 quality_baseline.json generation/update) + validator CheckRegression step1_5 (gradual decline, convergence, dimension divergence detection across 3+ rounds). InfoQ 2025 Pipeline Quality Gates, OpenAI 2025 Self-Evolving Agents, AtScale 2025 semantic drift.

B2: Round Provenance Chain — RecordSuccess step1_5 (per-round provenance record with SHA-256 integrity seal) + FinalReport step1_7 (audit trail compilation from provenance chain). SLSA Framework, JFrog 2025 software provenance, in-toto attestation.

B3: Convergence Detection — LoopControl step1_5 (quality convergence, gradual decline exit, score ceiling, dimension divergence; mode-dependent action: AUTO auto-exit, SEMI/SUPERVISED user choice). Composio 2025 Polling Tax, Martin Fowler YAGNI, ByteBridge 2026 HOTL.

B4: Protocol Alignment Hardening — ResolveTarget step2_5 (axiom_0 verification, governance_mode check, governance_hash SHA-256 verification, trust_level consistency). NIST AI RMF 2025, Deloitte 2026, SLSA Level 2.
